overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player navigates through covered overpasses, open intersections, and dense commercial districts with heavy atmospheric rain and reflective wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete infrastructure

events.description: exits covered overpass into open rainy street with visible sky
heavy rain becomes visible with water droplets on camera lens

agents.ego_description: accelerating motorcycle out of covered area into rain-soaked urban street

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving in opposing lane with headlights on

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass with linear fluorescent lighting fixtures
large cylindrical support column for the overhead highway structure
building exterior illuminated with green neon accent lighting
metal guardrail separating lanes with reflective strips

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered highway overpass with artificial lighting and concrete infrastructure. The player drives forward and exits into heavy rain at 3.5 seconds, transitioning from sheltered to exposed conditions. A silver sedan passes in the opposing lane as the motorcycle accelerates onto the wet open road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with crosswalks and overpasses

events.description: passes through large intersection with yellow striped crosswalk markings
makes slight right turn following road curvature through commercial district

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet city intersections, passing under elevated highways and alongside traffic barriers

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving ahead in same lane with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
elevated concrete highway crossing perpendicular to the street ahead
large vertical digital billboard displaying pink neon advertisements
construction barriers with alternating yellow and red stripes

segments.scene_description: Driving through open urban intersections with heavy rain creating reflections on the wet asphalt. The player crosses yellow-striped crosswalks and passes under elevated highway structures. Pink neon billboards illuminate the right side while construction barriers line the left. A black sports car drives ahead with brake lights glowing in the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street corridor beneath overpasses with neon signage

events.description: enters covered corridor beneath elevated highway with reduced visibility
exits covered section back into open rain with view of elevated train tracks

agents.ego_description: weaving through narrow urban corridor beneath overpasses, navigating around slower traffic

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving slowly ahead with exhaust steam visible

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating covered tunnel effect
vertical neon sign with glowing cyan chinese characters
ground-level steam vent releasing white vapor onto the street
raised railway structure running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a narrow covered corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses at 19 seconds, transitioning from open rain to a sheltered environment with artificial lighting. Neon signs with Chinese characters glow on the left wall while steam vents release vapor onto the road. The player exits back into open rain at 25 seconds, revealing elevated train tracks on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramps with curved guardrails and large billboards

events.description: navigates right curve on elevated roadway with leaning motion
approaches and passes under large overhead highway structure

agents.ego_description: taking right curves on elevated highway ramps, maintaining speed through wet conditions

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead on the curved ramp with taillights visible through rain

entered.detail: metal safety barrier following the curve of the elevated roadway
massive illuminated advertisement screen displaying product imagery
vertical sign with red neon lettering spelling HOTEL
exposed utility pipes and conduits running along building exterior

segments.scene_description: Navigating elevated highway ramps with curved guardrails on the left and massive digital billboards on the right. The road curves right through industrial areas with exposed piping. A neon hotel sign glows on the right side as the player passes under overhead highway structures at 36.5 seconds, with rain continuing to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with ground-level shops and heavy neon signage

events.description: enters dense commercial zone with increased neon signage and storefront density
passes through intersection with green traffic light and pedestrian crossing

agents.ego_description: cruising through dense commercial streets lined with neon storefronts and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking on sidewalk near storefront

entered.detail: ground-level shops with illuminated windows and neon signage
large floating holographic advertisement displaying animated content
elevated walkway bridge connecting buildings across the street
building-sized digital display showing video advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment drives through a dense commercial district with heavy neon lighting and ground-level storefronts. Holographic billboards and massive video screens dominate the skyline. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks on the right sidewalk. The player passes through a green-lit intersection at 48 seconds, continuing through the rain-soaked cyberpunk city streets with elevated walkways overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked metropolis, transitioning from sheltered concrete underpasses to an expansive, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins beneath a covered highway overpass before emerging into heavy rain and accelerating past a silver sedan onto wet, reflective asphalt. As the motorcycle navigates open intersections marked by pink neon billboards and glowing brake lights, the scene shifts back into a sheltered corridor filled with steam vents and glowing Chinese characters before exiting once more into the open rain beneath elevated train tracks. The camera then glides along curved highway ramps and industrial piping, passing under overhead structures and glowing hotel signs. Finally, the environment opens into a dense commercial hub where holographic billboards and massive video screens tower over rain-slicked streets and pedestrians with umbrellas.
